string 2: ...Wake up.

Once you're ready, begin your investigation anew.
I have faith in you.

Oh! The door's open!
Let's hide!

If we use these doors to our advantage, 
we should be able to safely sneak past Parallelmon.
Ack! They're here, too!

What the heck is happening?!
We gotta run for it!

Oh, gimme a break!
Not here, too?!
We gotta dip! Hurry!

WHAAAAAT?!
They're here, too?!

Time to bounce again!
I'm getting sick of this!

Huh? There's no Parallelmon in sight...
Is this the only safe room?

We got behind them...
They don't seem to have noticed.
They seriously haven't noticed...!

We're behind them...?
And they haven't noticed us?

Huh? There's no Parallelmon in sight...
Is this the only safe room?

You will be facing Parallelmon.
Ready yourselves for battle.

Okay, preparations are complete. It's one possibility of many,
but based on what I saw while imprisoned in the crystals...

...Parallelmon's objective appears to be the 
preservation and continued expansion of this territory.

To that end, they have been kidnapping powerful beings
to use them in these black crystals.

They surely never expected us to take such action. 
Let us bring an end to this!

I plan on giving Parallelmon a severe beating with
these fists of mine. C'mon. Pick the rest of your party.

Please, take me with you! 
I know I can be of help to you.
{next}[Make BanchoLillymon (Data) your ally.]
{end}[Don't recruit.]
I... want to be by BanchoLeomon's side... always...

W-wait! You didn't hear me say nothing!
And don't go listening in on a maiden's mumblings!

It seems the final battle against Parallelmon is upon us. 
My blood's boiling... I know you're taking me with you, right?
{next}[Make BanchoStingmon (Free) your ally.]
{end}[Don't recruit.]

Ouch... BanchoLeomon packs a mean punch.
I'm still hurting from our little encounter.

I wouldn't have it any other way, though. This pain
will turn into an everlasting bond. Right, brother?
I'm going with you. That's all I'm gonna say about that.
{next}[Make BanchoGolemon (Virus) your ally.]
{end}[Don't recruit.]
If you wanna speak, then do so with your fists.

The time for vengeance is finally here! 
Believe in the Mamemon Alliance and we're sure to win!
{next}[Make BanchoMamemon (Data) your ally.]
{end}[Don't recruit.]
Hey, I won't be callin' ya a phony anymore, brother.

These Banchos... They're really something. 
I bet they'll get a TON of views!

I need to get back to my world, ASAP.
What we've documented here might be useful there.

There's not much, but let me give you a copy
of the audio and video I've taken so far.

It's a content goldmine, but this is serious. 
We have no idea what the future might hold...

So I'm trusting you with this data. Who knows? 
Something in them might prove useful.

O-Oh, no!
Run for your lives!
The door is shut tight.

You can use this to return to the In-Between Theater.
However, all of your progress up to this point will be lost.
{end}[Continue investigating.]
[Quit.]

It looks like we keep coming back to the same room...
Maybe we should try using "Analyze".

What the... How did we get sent back here? At any rate, 
let's be sure that we don't let Parallelmon catch us this time!
